learning_objective: Students select appropriate citizen science projects based on their interests, location, and available resources.
specification:
Type: infographic **sim-id:** citizen-science
**Library:** p5.js
**Status:** Specified **Bloom Level:** Apply **Bloom Verb:** Select **Learning Objective:** Students select appropriate citizen science projects based on their interests, location, and available resources. **Instructional Rationale:** Making citizen science personally actionable transforms students from passive learners to active participants in environmental research. **Visual Elements:** - Interactive card layout of 10+ citizen science projects - Each card shows: project name, icon, topic area, difficulty level, time commitment, equipment needed, link - Filter sidebar with checkboxes for: topic (birds, water, air, plants, climate), difficulty (beginner, intermediate, advanced), time commitment, indoor/outdoor - "Match me" quiz that recommends projects based on student preferences - Map showing project density by region **Interactions:** - Filter projects by interest area and constraints - Click cards to expand full project descriptions with getting-started guides - "Match me" personality quiz (5 questions) → personalized recommendations - Save favorites to a "My Projects" list - Compare projects side by side **Colors:** Biodiversity projects: green (#2a9d8f), water projects: blue (#457b9d), air projects: light purple (#7b2cbf), climate projects: orange (#f4a261), cards: white on navy (#264653)
